name: POS ETL Pipeline
description: Batch Dataflow pipeline that loads a single POS file from GCS into Cloud SQL Postgres

parameters.name: input_file
parameters.label: Input file (full GCS path)
parameters.helpText: gs://bucket/path/to/file.csv — the single file this job processes

parameters.name: field_map_path
parameters.label: Field map path
parameters.helpText: Local path or gs:// path to field_map.json
